forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e380
+project: spatial-nav
+title: Grid ↔ LeftNav (view switcher) spatial nav (left boundary)
+---
+## What
+
+The LeftNav strip on the left edge of the window contains the view-switcher buttons. Today, from a row-selector cell in the grid, pressing `h` cannot reach the LeftNav — the user is trapped. The stated purpose of universal spatial nav was "keyboard to anywhere on screen and not get trapped."
+
+Root cause: `LeftNav` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/left-nav.tsx` renders plain `<button>` elements with `onClick` dispatches. No FocusScope, no spatial entry.
+
+### TDD — failing tests
+
+```ts
+describe("grid to LeftNav nav", () => {
+  it("h from row selector moves focus to the active LeftNav button", async () => {
+    // Click row-3 selector. Press h.
+    // Focus lands on the active view's button in LeftNav.
+  });
+
+  it("l from an active LeftNav button moves focus to the row selector of the visible top row", async () => {
+    // Click the active LeftNav button. Press l.
+    // Focus lands on row-0 selector.
+  });
+
+  it("j/k between LeftNav view buttons", async () => {
+    // With 2+ views, click the top button. Press j. Focus lands on the next view's button.
+  });
+});
+```
+
+All must fail against HEAD first.
+
+### Likely fix
+
+Wrap each view button in `LeftNav` in a `FocusScope` with `moniker("view", view.id)`. Use `renderContainer={false}` + `FocusScopeElementRefContext` so the button keeps being the actual DOM element. A new `LeftNavItem` sub-component is fine (keeps `LeftNav` under the function-length limit).
+
+Do NOT attempt without the failing tests. Same reason: the session tried this blind and broke things.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `h` from row selector → active LeftNav button
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `l` from LeftNav button → row selector
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `j/k` between LeftNav buttons
+- [ ] Implement fix only until each test passes
+- [ ] Verify existing `LeftNav` unit tests (if any) still pass
+- [ ] Verify no regression in grid nav or perspective bar nav
+
+### Acceptance
+
+- [ ] All three failing tests pass
+- [ ] Clicking a LeftNav button still dispatches `view.switch:<id>`
+- [ ] Tooltip still shows on hover
\ No newline at end of file
